EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Enum rstPixelType

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Supported raster pixel types.

[Guid("DE9E9A2C-7E9C-4DA1-8790-0919707733FB")]
public enum rstPixelType

Fields

PT_CBYTE = 23

23: Pixel values are complex unsigned 2-byte data (1-byte real, 1-byte imaginary).

PT_CHAR = 4

4: Pixel values are 8 bit integers.

PT_CLONG = 14

14: Pixel values are long integer complex.

PT_COMPLEX = 11

11: Pixel values are single precsion complex.

PT_CSHORT = 13

13: Pixel values are short integer complex.

PT_DATA10 = 16

16: Pixel values are 10-Byte data.

PT_DATA12 = 17

17: Pixel values are 12-Byte data.

PT_DATA16 = 18

18: Pixel values are 16-Byte data.

PT_DATA20 = 19

19: Pixel values are 20-Byte data.

PT_DATA24 = 20

20: Pixel values are 24-Byte data.

PT_DATA32 = 21

21: Pixel values are 32-Byte data.

PT_DATA36 = 22

22: Pixel values are 36 byte data.

PT_DATA8 = 15

15: Pixel values are 8-Byte data.

PT_DCOMPLEX = 12

12: Pixel values are double precision complex.

PT_DOUBLE = 10

10: Pixel values are double precision floating point.

PT_FLOAT = 9

9: Pixel values are single precision floating point.

PT_LONG = 8

8: Pixel values are 32 bit integers.

PT_SHORT = 6

6: Pixel values are 16 bit integers.

PT_U1 = 0

0: Pixel values are 1 bit.

PT_U2 = 1

1: Pixel values are 2 bits.

PT_U4 = 2

2: Pixel values are 4 bits.

PT_UCHAR = 3

3: Pixel values are unsigned 8 bit integers.

PT_ULONG = 7

7: Pixel values are unsigned 32 bit integers.

PT_UNKNOWN = -1

-1: Pixel values are unknown.

PT_USHORT = 5

5: Pixel values are unsigned 16 bit integers.
